displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #6: Dark Lord
synopsis: The storm clouds of battle gather over Yavin Four, and that entire world could be a casualty! To make his final stand against Jedi Nomi Sunrider, the betrayer Ulic Qel-Droma has let slip the dogs of war in a final, climactic confrontation.
title: Tales of the Jedi: The Sith War #6: Dark Lord
